description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for Elasticsearch clusters using the OpenTelemetry Elasticsearch receiver. Covers node metrics, cluster health, index performance, query latency, and cache statistics.
title: Elasticsearch Monitoring Dashboard

2c9c9d63-5ca1-4eb6-9cda-5eecc8b3a151.name: deployment.environment
2c9c9d63-5ca1-4eb6-9cda-5eecc8b3a151.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') AS `deployment.environment`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'elasticsearch.cluster.health'
GROUP BY `deployment.environment`

333c774d-3f31-4ff6-9e9f-9a177c0463dd.name: elasticsearch.node.name
333c774d-3f31-4ff6-9e9f-9a177c0463dd.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'elasticsearch.node.name') AS `elasticsearch.node.name`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'elasticsearch.node.fs.disk.total'
GROUP BY `elasticsearch.node.name`

29652c25-fd2f-490d-bbe3-444972252828.name: elasticsearch.cluster.name
29652c25-fd2f-490d-bbe3-444972252828.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'elasticsearch.cluster.name') AS `elasticsearch.cluster.name`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'elasticsearch.cluster.health'
GROUP BY `elasticsearch.cluster.name`
